Inter Milan Eye Roma’s Zalewski Amidst Competition from De Zerbi
arts.sum: Inter Milan are looking to bolster their squad following the departures of Tomás Palacios to Monza and Tajon Buchanan's imminent move to Villarreal. The club's focus has shifted to strengthening their wide positions rather than central defence, still hoping for Acerbi's recovery. arts.ttl: Inter Milan looking to sign Arsenal player on the cheap – Plan in the works
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has been a bit-part player for Arsenal this season. The Ukrainian has made 13 appearances in all competitions, playing a little over 400 minutes. He has remained on the bench in the club’s last two games. As his game time continues to reduce at Arsenal, Zinchenko’s future is therefore under some question. InterLive The post Inter Milan looking to sign Arsenal player on the cheap – Plan in the works appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Ebimbe's move to Monaco falls through
arts.sum: Junior Dina Ebimbe's move from Eintracht Frankfurt to Monaco has collapsed, according to Fabrizio Romano.
